final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] din,
    output reg [15:0] dout
);
    reg [15:0] obf_memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit obf_memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            obf_memory[addr] <= din; // Write data to obf_memory
        end
        dout <= obf_memory[addr]; // Read data from obf_memory
    end
endmodule
